description: Paddle provides billing infrastructure for software and digital product companies, including subscriptions, pricing, checkout, invoicing, and related customer and revenue workflows. Its platform includes a developer-facing API and hosted AI-agent integrations for documentation access and account operations.
summary: Paddle exposes a REST Billing API at `https://api.paddle.com` plus two hosted MCP servers: a Kapa-backed docs MCP server and account-connected Paddle MCP servers for sandbox and live environments; all discovered surfaces require authentication.
